mission.title: openfga: Update `openfga/language` Go module for DSL transformer/parser and refactor usages
mission.description: Update `openfga/language` Go module for DSL transformer/parser and refactor usages. Community-requested feature.

steps.title: Check current openfga deployment
steps.description:
Verify your openfga version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n openfga -l app.kubernetes.io/name=openfga
helm list -n openfga 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working openfga installation.

steps.title: Review openfga configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant openfga configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n openfga -l app.kubernetes.io/name=openfga
kubectl get configmap -n openfga -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=openfga
```
- [X] I agree to the terms within the [OpenFGA Code of Conduct](https://github.com/openfga/.github/blob/main/CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md).

steps.title: Apply the fix for Update `openfga/language` Go module for DSL…
steps.description:
how are things going? If you have decided not to work on this task, please do let us know.

If you are still working on it, I would encourage you to open a Draft PR as that will help us see your progress and other folks to provide valuable feedback

See the source issue for community-verified solutions.

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n openfga -l app.kubernetes.io/name=openfga
kubectl get events -n openfga --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Update `openfga/language` Go module for DSL…" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
how are things going? If you have decided not to work on this task, please do let us know.

If you are still working on it, I would encourage you to open a Draft PR as that will help us see your progress and other folks to provide valuable feedback

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with openfga installed or the issue environment reproducible.
